scripts.test:e2e:electron: bun run electron:compile && PW_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 playwright test --project=electron
scripts.electron:compile:main: tsup electron/main.ts --format esm --outDir dist-electron --external electron --external uiohook-napi --external pngjs --sourcemap
scripts.electron:compile: rm -rf dist-electron && concurrently -n main,preload -c green,yellow "bun run electron:compile:main" "bun run electron:compile:preload"
scripts.electron:watch:main: tsup electron/main.ts --format esm --outDir dist-electron --external electron --external uiohook-napi --external pngjs --sourcemap --watch electron --watch src
scripts.electron:watch:preload: tsup electron/preload.ts --format cjs --outDir dist-electron --external electron --sourcemap --watch electron --watch src
scripts.electron:start: wait-on tcp:3000 file:dist-electron/main.js file:dist-electron/preload.cjs && bun run scripts/dev-electron.ts
scripts.electron:dev: rm -rf dist-electron && bun run native:build && concurrently -k --success first -n next,main,preload,app -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "bun run dev:next" "bun run electron:watch:main" "bun run electron:watch:preload" "bun run electron:start"
scripts.electron:build: bun run build && bun run next:prepare-standalone && bun run electron:compile && bun run native:build && bun run electron:rebuild:force && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:publish: bun run build && bun run next:prepare-standalone && bun run electron:compile && bun run native:build && bun run electron:rebuild:force && electron-builder --publish always
scripts.electron:build:cpu: bun run build && bun run next:prepare-standalone && bun run electron:compile && bun run native:build && bun run electron:rebuild:force && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cpu.yml
scripts.electron:build:gpu: bun run build && bun run next:prepare-standalone && bun run electron:compile && bun run native:build && bun run electron:rebuild:force && electron-builder --config electron-builder.gpu.yml
scripts.electron:build:publish:cpu: bun run build && bun run next:prepare-standalone && bun run electron:compile && bun run native:build && bun run electron:rebuild:force && electron-builder --config electron-builder.cpu.yml --publish always
scripts.electron:build:publish:gpu: bun run build && bun run next:prepare-standalone && bun run electron:compile && bun run native:build && bun run electron:rebuild:force && electron-builder --config electron-builder.gpu.yml --publish always
